identity.mission: Create a visceral, scientifically accurate, and visually stunning educational platform about Seismic Waves.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Physics Lab precision with Sci-Fi UI aesthetics.
Emotion First: Capture the raw power of earthquakes (danger) vs. the elegance of wave physics (math).
Content is King: Every animation must teach a concept, not just decorate.
Dark Mode Default: Use the depth of the earth and space as the primary canvas.

usage.hero_title: font-outfit font-black text-6xl md:text-8xl tracking-tighter uppercase

buttons.primary: relative overflow-hidden rounded-md bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-cyan-600 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(6,182,212,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(6,182,212,0.5)] font-outfit font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-sm py-3 px-8
buttons.secondary: rounded-md border border-white/20 bg-transparent text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300 font-outfit font-medium uppercase tracking-widest text-sm py-3 px-8
buttons.destructive: rounded-md bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors font-outfit font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-sm py-3 px-8

cards.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-900/60 border border-white/10 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:border-cyan-500/30 hover:shadow-cyan-500/10 hover:-translate-y-1
cards.solid: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-lg

inputs.default: bg-slate-950/50 border border-white/10 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent text-white placeholder-slate-500 font-manrope
inputs.slider: w-full h-2 bg-slate-800 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer accent-cyan-500

navigation.header: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-md bg-slate-950/80 border-b border-white/5
navigation.link: font-outfit font-medium text-sm text-slate-400 hover:text-cyan-400 transition-colors uppercase tracking-wider

motion.scroll_reveal: Use viewport={{ once: true, amount: 0.3 }} for scroll-triggered animations.

assets.simulation: HTML5 Canvas API (Use useRef in React)

homepage.hero: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). Animated seismic wave background (Canvas). Large, bold typography. 'Enter the Earth's Core' CTA.
homepage.intro: Bento grid showcasing 'What is an Earthquake?', 'Recent Activity', 'Safety Tips'.
homepage.team: Glassmorphism cards for authors and school info.

theory.layout: Side-by-side: Text content (left) vs Interactive Diagrams (right). Sticky scroll for diagrams.
theory.content: Rich text with 'highlight' spans for key terms (P-wave, Epicenter, Focus).

simulator.layout: Dashboard style. Main Canvas viewport (70%) + Control Panel (30%).
simulator.controls: Sliders for Amplitude, Frequency, Wave Type selector (Tabs).
simulator.feedback: Real-time graph updating below the wave visualizer.

quiz.layout: Centered, focused card. Progress bar at top. One question at a time. Instant feedback animations (Shake for wrong, Glow for right).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is slate-50 on slate-900. Use slate-400 for secondary text. Avoid dark red on dark background.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect 'prefers-reduced-motion' by disabling auto-play canvas animations.
accessibility.keyboard_nav: All custom sliders and canvas elements must be focusable and operable via keyboard.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind config with the specified colors and fonts immediately.
2. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Navbar and Footer globally.
3. Use 'framer-motion' for ALL page transitions. No hard cuts.
4. For the Wave Simulator: Create a custom React hook 'useWaveSimulation' that manages the Canvas context.
5. For the Seismograph: Use 'recharts' LineChart with a mock data stream that updates every 100ms.
6. Ensure the Dark/Light toggle works, but optimize heavily for Dark Mode as the primary experience.
7. Use the provided image URLs for section backgrounds (with overlay) or feature cards.
8. TRANSLATE ALL CONTENT TO ROMANIAN as per the requirements.
9. Create a 'SoundManager' context for handling the earthquake sound effects (with mute toggle).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts
Sonner component are located in '/app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx'
